---
title: "Sales Performance Analysis Dashboard"
author: Weibing Xue
date: today
format: html
---

# Business Problem

How can we monitor regional sales performance efficiently and identify issues in real time to support business decision-making?

# Data

The dataset consists of regional sales data collected daily, including:
- Sales volume by region
- Product-level performance
- Time-series sales trends

# Method

- Built automated dashboards using Excel (INDEX-MATCH, VLOOKUP, COUNTIFS)
- Cleaned and validated data to identify anomalies
- Aggregated regional performance metrics for comparison

# Results

- Improved reporting efficiency by automating data processing
- Identified inconsistencies in sales data across regions
- Enabled managers to track performance in real time

# Business Insight

Real-time visibility into sales performance allows companies to quickly detect issues and adjust strategy.

# Recommendation

- Implement automated dashboards across all regions
- Standardize data collection processes to reduce inconsistencies
- Use data-driven monitoring to support faster decision-making
